posts.author: Jorgen (Jorgen )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All
Question or possibly suggestion.

Is there the ability to move columns in My Workspace
I have a large amount of free space in one column and very little in another column.
I can not read the name of the Boards and Groups.
Every other board setup in Monday has the ability to move columns apart from my workspace.

Thanks Jorgen
